## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix/*`)
- [ ] Feature (`feature/*`)

- [ ] Tested manually (describe below)
- [ ] README updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] Did **not** run `pnpm version:bump` or edit `VERSION` / `package.json` version
